Yaroslav Burdin


Mini Bio


Projects <


Engaging Info


Projects

The whats and whys

Binary Image Classifier

Being inspired by current achievements of deep learning in healthcare diagnostics, I decided to apply my machine learning skills and built MRI brain tumor detector.

Golf Course Web Scraping

While researching on data, I’ve came across Aaron Swartz and his deeds. I got captivated by the ideas that he carried out to the public and started learning data scraping, data processing and data visualizing tools and techniques.

I’ve scraped golf course data, built a data model and used Tableau to visualize my findings.

On-Board System for Driving Style Assesment

For my senior design project my team and I decided to build the system that would be capable of detecting aggresive driving behavior with further notification of the driver or parents (in cases, where the system was used as a parental control) by email or text messaging.

I was responsible for the driving style assessment using accelerometer data. I used k-means clustering method to categorize actions: speeding, sharp turns, break slamming.
